description: A disclosure panel that folds and unfolds related content while retaining its source position and hierarchy.

a11y.reducedMotion: Switch between expanded and collapsed layout without interpolation while preserving the same control state and content order.
a11y.keyboardContract: A native button controls aria-expanded and aria-controls; content remains in logical document order.
a11y.nonVisualEquivalent: Fold state is expressed through expanded or collapsed text and programmatic disclosure semantics.
